The '''Palpatine Gardens''' were a large set of gardens on the grounds of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. They were among the locations visited by [[Galaxy Tours/Legends|Galaxy Tours]]' [[Grand Galactic Tour]], with their being among the rare events to allow for a public tour of the gardens.<ref name="RPG" />
